slogan: Your Organization. Your Digital Workforce. One Intelligence.
intro: Manusia dan Digital Workforce pakai Organization Memory yang sama. Ganti perspective — lihat apa yang dibutuhkan tiap role. Satu intelligence, banyak sudut pandang.
demoFlowTitle: Alur demo — Proposal Analyst → Memory → CEO insight
demoComplete: Demo selesai — Proposal Analyst selesai kerja, Organization Memory ke-update, CEO dapat insight baru. Memory sama, perspektif beda.
memoryBannerDesc: Output Proposal Analyst sudah ter-index — kelihatan di semua perspective dan Executive Brief CEO.
footerReady: Buka Executive Brief sebagai CEO untuk lihat insight dari Digital Workforce.
footerIdle: Jalankan demo — lihat Proposal Analyst bekerja, lalu Executive Brief CEO ke-update.

proposal-analyst.name: Proposal Analyst
proposal-analyst.description: Baca proposal, RFP, dan dokumen tender — angkat opportunity, gap, dan competitive risk ke Organization Memory.
proposal-analyst.workingTask: Menganalisis PLN SCADA Phase II vs bid modul gardu Siemens…

contract-reviewer.name: Contract Reviewer
contract-reviewer.description: Review kontrak dan MSA — flag payment terms, liability exposure, dan renewal clause untuk finance & legal.

relationship-analyst.name: Relationship Analyst
relationship-analyst.description: Pantau pola komunikasi di seluruh account — deteksi relationship drift, perubahan champion, dan penurunan engagement.

delivery-monitor.name: Delivery Monitor
delivery-monitor.description: Track progress initiative vs komitmen — eskalasi milestone yang stuck dan resource conflict ke program lead.

commercial-analyst.name: Commercial Analyst
commercial-analyst.description: Pantau commercial record — prediksi payment delay, flag outstanding invoice, dan model cash-flow exposure.

1.label: Perspective Sales
1.detail: Proposal Analyst terima proposal PLN SCADA

2.label: Digital Workforce bekerja
2.detail: Analisis competitive positioning vs bid Siemens

3.label: Organization Memory
3.detail: Hasil ter-index — memory yang sama untuk manusia dan agent

4.label: Perspective CEO
4.detail: Insight strategis baru muncul di Executive Brief

ceo.title: Executive Command
ceo.description: Tampilan strategis lintas account, initiative, dan insight Digital Workforce — satu intelligence untuk setiap keputusan.

cfo.title: Commercial Control
cfo.description: Revenue pipeline, outstanding invoice, dan payment risk — Commercial Analyst pantau setiap record.

sales.title: Pipeline Intelligence
sales.description: Proposal aktif, momentum account, dan competitive signal — Proposal Analyst kerja bareng tim Anda.

project.title: Delivery Command
project.description: Kesehatan initiative, milestone tracking, dan eskalasi blocker — Delivery Monitor jaga program tetap on track.

hr.title: People Intelligence
hr.description: Stakeholder engagement, relationship health, dan konektivitas organisasi — Relationship Analyst deteksi drift lebih awal.

workforceOutput.memoryTitle: Proposal Analysis — PLN SCADA Phase II
workforceOutput.memorySubtitle: Digital Workforce · Proposal Analyst · Bid Siemens 12% lebih rendah di modul gardu — disarankan value-engineering response
workforceOutput.ceoInsightTitle: Insight Digital Workforce — competitive positioning PLN
workforceOutput.ceoInsightDesc: Proposal Analyst flag Siemens 12% lebih rendah di modul gardu. Disarankan value-engineering response sebelum board submission 11 Juli — melindungi pipeline Rp 4,2 M.
workforceOutput.timelineTitle: Proposal Analyst selesaikan competitive analysis PLN SCADA
workforceOutput.timelineSummary: Output Digital Workforce ter-index ke Organization Memory. Executive Brief CEO ke-update dengan insight competitive positioning.
